title: Hospitalization & Insurance
description: This category explains hospital-stay concepts in Poland — the discharge document (karta informacyjna leczenia szpitalnego), referrals, SOR, and electronic medical documentation — plus the general shape of a private insurance claim and where policyholder-protection information lives.
owns: hospital stay and discharge document concepts
referrals and SOR at a general level
private insurance claim basics and complaint routes
doesNotOwn: guaranteeing insurance coverage or claim outcomes
reviewing your policy or personal documents
